name: Shantayvia reed
ai_summary: Shantayvia Reed from Augusta, GA has full-time availability and extensive childcare experience with children of all ages from newborns to older kids. She resolves conflicts by separating children and involving parents and school leadership, and believes her passion for children makes her a great teacher.
